title: Xenial Bitter German Morbier Casserole
description: A bitter and savory German dish featuring Morbier cheese, perfect for a date night, made in a kadhai with paleo-friendly ingredients and a fermenting process.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large kadhai, heat the coconut oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until caramelized.
Add the sliced paleo sausage and cook until browned.
Add the fermented sauerkraut, apple cider vinegar, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Arrange the sliced Morbier cheese on top of the sausage mixture.
Transfer the kadhai to the preheated oven and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the kadhai from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the casserole hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
